sizing_rule.note: Position size derived from optimal f calculated via scenario analysis (probabilities × payoffs). Example: .17 optimal f from scenarios [prob: 0.3, 0.4, 0.3 | payoff: -20, 0, 30]. Critical warning: optimal f sizing produces expected drawdowns approaching 100% equity retracement; practitioners should consider fractional Kelly or reduced f for risk tolerance.

source_rule_text: Position size should be determined using optimal f based on scenario analysis with probabilities and payoffs, understanding that expected drawdowns will approach 100% equity retracement when applying optimal f.
